column1: If it _____ (to rain) today, we won't go for a walk.
If the wind _____ (to change), there will be snow.
If you are careful, you _____ (not to break) the cups.
If I ______ (to have) free time, I will go for a walk with you.
If he goes hiking in summer, he ______ (to see) a lot of interesting things.
If he goes shopping, he _____ (to buy) books for me.
If we ______ (to leave) at 7 o’clock, we will arrive on time.
If Bob gets a good job, he ______ (to buy) a new car.
The child will start crying if you ____________ (to break) the toy.
